candidates.why: Appears in the cost-of-sales section directly beneath the selected total COGS row, suggesting it is a component/breakout of Cost of goods sold rather than a separate same-level operating expense to add on top.
This row appears under Other operating expenses, not in the COGS bucket, so it is not relevant for COGS_DA.
Blank row with no visible operating values; not usable as a separate COGS D&A add-on.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of goods sold. The visible 'Depreciation and amortization' in the COGS section looks like a sub-component within the COGS hierarchy, so adding it separately would risk double counting.

candidates.why: Appears directly under Selling and marketing expenses, indicating it is a sub-component of the selected SG&A parent bucket rather than a separate same-level line to add.
Appears directly under Administrative expenses, indicating it is a sub-component of the selected administrative expense row rather than a separate add-on.
Appears under Other operating expenses, which was not selected as part of XSGA_COMPONENTS, so it is outside the target SG&A component bucket.
Blank row with no visible operating values; not usable as a separate SG&A D&A add-on.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket is the sum of Selling and marketing expenses, Administrative expenses, and Research and development expenses. The visible SGA/admin D&A rows appear nested beneath selected parent rows, so they are treated as already embedded. No separate above-EBIT amortization-in-R&D row is visible.
